folio.label: 100r
folio.l: That parfytly , hire children loued she
He wolde han wende , that of som sotiltee
And of malice , or for cruel corage
That she had suffred this , witú sad visage
¢ But wel he knew , that next hi~ self certeyn
She loued hire children best , in euäy wyse
But now of wommen , wold I asken fayn
If theise assayes , mygút nat suffise
What coude a sturdy husbonde , more deuyse
To preue hire wyfhode , and hire stedfastnesse
And he contynuynge , euäe in sturdynesse
¢ But there be folk , of swicú condiciouö
That whan they han , a certeyn purpos take
They conne nat stynt , of here entenciou~
But rigút as they were bounden , vn to a stake
They wyl nat , of that first purpos slake
Rigút so this Markys , fullicú hatú purposed
To tempte his wyf , as he was first disposed
¢ He waytetú , if by word , or countenaunce
That she to hi~ , was chaunged of corage
But neuäe coude he fynde , variaunce
She was ay oon , in hert and in visage
And ay the ferthere , that she was in age
The more trewe , if that it were possible
She was to hi~ , in loue , and more penyble
¢ For whicú it semed thus , that of hem two
There nas but oo wyl , for as walter lest
The same lust , was hire plesaunce also
And god by thanked , as fel for the best
She shewed wel , for no worldly vnrest
A wyf as of hire self , no thyngö ne shulde
Wyln~ in effect , but as hire husbonde wolde
¢ The sclaunder of wautere , ofte and wyde sprad
That of cruel herte , he wykkedly
For he , a pore womman , wedded had
Hatú mordred , bothe hise children preuyly
Swicú murmur , was a mongö he~ comounly
No wonder is , for to the peeples Ere
There cam no word , but that they mordred were
¢ For whicú , there as his peeple ther byfore
Had loued hi~ wel , the sclaunder of his defame
Mad hem , that they hi~ hated therfore
To ben a mortherere , is an hateful name
But nathelees , for ernest or for game
He of his cruel purpos , nold he stynt
